name: com.vareiko.foundation
description: VContainer-based foundation architecture for Unity projects: app state, bootstrap, scene flow, save/settings, UI, audio, analytics and backend abstractions.

samples.description: Minimal scene wiring: ensures the project/scene scopes and a UI registry from one component.
Level-0 dogfood: boot pipeline, custom app state, tick-driven pooled gameplay and autosaved progress from a single component in an empty scene.
